{{Infobox location
| name = Alliance space
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is one of the four major territories that define the corners of the galaxy, alongside the [[Galactic Union]], the [[Free Worlds]], and [[Dark Space]]. It is considered the smallest of these major powers, consisting primarily of the [[Karoshan Empire]] and a small number of [[Visiri]] planets. Despite its limited size, it remains a significant force in the galaxy and maintains high-level military capabilities, including powerful dreadnoughts and large numbers of fighters. The [[Alliance]] is characterized by a high level of activity, with its systems featuring extensive networks of stations, colonies, and various spacecraft. The [[Visiria system]] serves as a prominent member of the [[Alliance]], acting as its secondary power. While the [[Alliance]] is a major civilized entity, it currently experiences tension with the [[Galactic Union]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Zorova]] is currently in [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is currently positioned in [[Alliance space]] around [[Dornoth IV]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax has been spotted recruiting forces across [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2" />}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Last Horizon]] entered [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is already in [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Alliance space]] marks one of the far borders of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
